pageContext.name: Andre the Giant (Black Singlet)
pageContext.description: Even on the grandest stage of them all, when Andre the Giant walked in, everyone stopped to take notice of the Eighth Wonder of the World!   Sideshow and Super7 are proud to introduce a new ULTIMATES! figure of Andre the Giant in his iconic black singlet from his late 1980s run. Standing 8 tall, this ULTIMATES! figure includes interchangeable heads and hands as well as a beer can accessory.   Just like the man himself, this Andre the Giant ULTIMATES! figure is a wonder to behold, so don't wrestle with your decision for too long! Add this made-to-order figure to your collection before you get counted out!
